name: Sarah Chen
bio: Met in university during our sophomore year. We bonded over late-night study sessions and terrible dining hall food. She's now a UX designer at a major tech company.

name: Marcus Johnson
bio: My former manager who took a chance on hiring me fresh out of university. His no-nonsense advice has shaped my career more than any course ever could.

name: Aisha Patel
bio: We met on a backpacking trip through Southeast Asia. She has an infectious laugh and an uncanny ability to find the best street food in any city.

name: Tom Baker
bio: Known Tom since we were seven years old. We grew up on the same street and survived middle school together. He shows up without being asked.

name: Olivia Martinez
bio: Olivia was our next-door neighbor for eight years and felt like family. She moved to another city but we swore we'd keep in touch.

name: Ryan O'Brien
bio: We met at the gym and discovered we work in the same industry. Our conversations mix fitness tips with career strategy.

name: Priya Sharma
bio: Priya and I started a book club that became more of a life advice club. She has incredible emotional intelligence.

name: James Wright
bio: Met James at a photography workshop three years ago. His eye for composition is extraordinary. We keep planning a road trip.

name: Lena Fischer
bio: Lena and I worked on the same product launch for six months and became inseparable. She moved back to Berlin but we do a weekly video call without fail.

name: Daniel Okafor
bio: Daniel was my senior thesis advisor and became a genuine friend afterward. He has a gift for asking the one question that reframes everything.
